sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the unit-03 template (objectif pragmatique + Point Langue grammar + thematic lexicon + DELF-format comprehension), then self-audited before commit. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego+ 2 (Hachette), Dossier 2 'Vers la vie active', Leçon 3 (les entretiens d'embauche; donner des conseils; le subjonctif pour exprimer la nécessité, il faut que). Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
